title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 219.071 - Children to be segregated from criminals
text:
219.071.  Children to be segregated from criminals. — No child committed to the division and awaiting transfer to the custody of the division or who has been detained in accordance with subsection 5 of section 219.026 shall be transported or detained in association with criminals or vicious and dissolute persons.
(L. 1975 S.B. 170 § 14)
